The Problem

Manual migration is a full-time job you didn't sign up for

  • ✕ Open a page. Copy it. Paste it. Reformat it. Repeat — 200 more times.
  • ✕ Weeks disappear into admin work instead of teaching or designing.
  • ✕ Inconsistent formatting across pages. Links break. Images disappear.
  • ✕ The backlog keeps growing. The migration never gets finished.

"For 230 pages, that's weeks of work — often stretching into months."

From a real project completed in 40 hours.

How It Works

Three steps. You handle one of them.

A custom-built process handles each page automatically — reading your content, applying structure, and placing everything into Canvas. No copy-pasting involved.

01
You send the material
PDFs, Word documents, a live website, or a mix. A short scoping call confirms the quote and scope before any work begins.
02
Migration runs
A custom workflow reads your content, structures it, and builds each Canvas page. Every page comes out consistent. Nothing gets missed.
03
You receive a finished course
Modules, pages, quizzes, assignments — all in place, built to your branding. One revision round included. Everything is ready for you to review.

What's Included

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

✓
Full content migration Text, images, tables, and embedded media — all moved across cleanly from your source material.
✓
Canvas course structure Modules, pages, quizzes, and assignments organised logically with clear learning objectives.
✓
Built to your branding Pages are built to match your institution's Canvas branding, confirmed with you before work begins.
✓
Consistent formatting throughout Every page looks the same. No rogue fonts, broken layouts, or drift across 50+ pages.
✓
One revision round Corrections to anything inconsistent with the agreed scope, within 7 days of delivery.
✓
Clear communication throughout Scope confirmed on day one, a mid-project check-in, and confirmation on delivery. No radio silence.
Scope is agreed with you before any work begins — so there are no surprises on either side. Anything outside that agreement is discussed and quoted separately before it's touched.

Most projects delivered in 1–2 weeks.

Work begins once the 50% deposit clears and all source materials are received. An estimated timeline is confirmed at scoping so you know what to expect from the start.
